news.html.description: Latest news and updates from Isaac Garee.

bio_html: I am an undergraduate student in Industrial & Systems Engineering at the University of Cincinnati, with minors in Mathematics and Statistics. My research interests center on optimization under uncertainty, including stochastic, bilevel, and derivative-free optimization methods. I am interested in both the theory behind optimization algorithms and their use in practical decision-making problems in healthcare operations, supply chains, and machine learning.
contact: Industrial & Systems Engineering, University of Cincinnati
